channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Optimistic Trump undeterred by rain delay at D.C. Freedom 250: 'I will be there no matter what'
Mr. Irrelevant: Bitter Newsom tries to rain on nation's birthday, quickly flattened by his own troubles
9/11 Museum CEO reflects on lasting impact of terror attacks as America marks 250th birthday
item.description: The 9/11 Memorial Museum commemorates America's 250th anniversary alongside the 25th anniversary of the attacks, emphasizing recovery and resilience.

item.title: Before the Boston Tea Party, there were New Hampshire's Pine Tree Riots
item.description: Governor Kelly Ayotte notes that the Pine Tree Riot in New Hampshire preceded the Boston Tea Party and may have inspired the famous colonial protest.
